name: Automatic criticality classification according to Manchester Protocol
scenarioId: classpath:features/dashboard:Automatic criticality classification according to Manchester Protocol
methodName: Automatic criticality classification according to Manchester Protocol

testSteps.description: 1: Automatic criticality classification according to Manchester Protocol ({id=1002003006, nombres=Pedro Luis, apellidos=Ramirez Vargas, birthDate=11/05/1975, gender=Hombre, fc=130, fr=28, spo2=82, temp=39.5, presion=90/60, consciousness=Confuso, pain=9, criticality=Emergencia})

children.description: Given the patient with id "1002003006", names "Pedro Luis", surnames "Ramirez Vargas", birth date "11/05/1975" and gender "Hombre" is registered in the system
Medicalstaff register patient
MedicalStaff opens the browser at http://localhost:5173/register
Medicalstaff fill patient form
MedicalStaff enters '1002003006' into identification field
MedicalStaff enters 'Pedro Luis' into names field
MedicalStaff enters 'Ramirez Vargas' into surnames field
MedicalStaff enters '11/05/1975' into birth date field
MedicalStaff selects Hombre on gender field
MedicalStaff clicks on register patient button
And the medical staff fills the vital signs form with fc "130", fr "28", spo2 "82", temp "39.5", presion "90/60", consciousness "Confuso" and pain "9"
Medicalstaff fill vital signs form
MedicalStaff enters '130' into heart rate field
MedicalStaff enters '28' into respiratory rate field
MedicalStaff enters '82' into oxygen saturation field
MedicalStaff enters '39.5' into temperature field
MedicalStaff enters '90/60' into blood pressure field
MedicalStaff selects Confuso on consciousness level field
MedicalStaff enters '9' into pain level field
And they click the "Guardar" button
MedicalStaff clicks on save vital signs button
Then they are redirected to the dashboard
MedicalStaff should see  that contains: <[/dashboard]>
And the patient with names "Pedro Luis" has criticality "Emergencia" in the dashboard table
MedicalStaff should see  that is equal to: <"Emergencia">

userStory.narrative:
As a medical staff member
  I want to view patients and their criticality on the dashboard
  So that I can prioritize patient care

title: Automatic criticality classification according to Manchester Protocol

dataTable.scenarioOutline:
Given the patient with id "<id>", names "<nombres>", surnames "<apellidos>", birth date "<birthDate>" and gender "<gender>" is registered in the system
And the medical staff fills the vital signs form with fc "<fc>", fr "<fr>", spo2 "<spo2>", temp "<temp>", presion "<presion>", consciousness "<consciousness>" and pain "<pain>"
And they click the "Guardar" button
Then they are redirected to the dashboard
And the patient with names "<nombres>" has criticality "<criticality>" in the dashboard table
